title: Naboo (disambiguation)
content:
'''Naboo''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Naboo]]''', the [[planet]]
*The [[Naboo (people)|'''Naboo''']], the [[human]]s who lived there
*[[Naboo (star)|'''Naboo''']], its [[star]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Naboo/Legends|'''Naboo''']], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]
*[[Naboo (language)|'''Naboo''']], the language spoken there
*The [[Naboo (people)/Legends|'''Naboo''']], the [[Human/Legends|humans]] who lived there
*[[Naboo (star)/Legends|'''Naboo''']], the star of the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]]

==[[In-universe|Real-world]]==
*'''[[Naboo (reference book)|''Naboo'']]''', an issue of [[De Agostini|Altaya's]] [[Star Wars Encyclopedia (series)|''Star Wars Encyclopedia'']]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Naboo (Begriffsklärung)
|ja=ナブー（曖昧さ回避）
}}
